description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a flat roof and a spacious wraparound terrace bordered by black metal railings. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large windows and sliding glass doors providing access to the outdoor areas. The terrace is furnished with round tables, chairs, and large patio umbrellas, creating inviting outdoor living spaces. Inside, the rooms are decorated with green accent walls, potted plants, and modern furnishings, visible through the open floor plan. The building's design emphasizes openness and connection to the outdoors, with multiple entry points from the terrace. The overall aesthetic is modern and minimalistic, with clean lines and a focus on comfort and functionality.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, wraparound terrace, black railings, and outdoor seating areas shaded by large umbrellas. The design features large windows, green interior accents, and an open, airy layout.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side of the bungalow with a long stretch of terrace, black railings, and visible green interior walls and plants.
description_view_1: The front view showcases the main entrance, large windows, two patio umbrellas, and outdoor seating on the terrace.
description_view_2: This side view reveals more of the terrace, a round table with chairs under an umbrella, and a glimpse of the open interior layout.
description_view_3: The rear view shows a simpler facade with fewer windows, the back portion of the terrace, and interior rooms with green accents.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
